title: Use of English — Test 3
explanation:
Use of English — A2 Test 3

Final mixed A2 review test.

questions.text: She [*has never been|never was|never is] to Canada.
The windows [*were broken|broke|were breaking] in the storm.
If you [*don't hurry|won't hurry|not hurry], you'll miss the bus.

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 2
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: There are very ____ people here. | *few | little | much
He asked me to ____ him a favour. | *do | make | give
I ____ out of milk this morning. | *ran | run | running
This is the ____ expensive hotel in town. | *most | more | much
She would buy a house if she [*had|has|have] enough money.
[*Did|Used|Were] you use to walk to school?
